content.en:
"I didn't expect to harvest so many source stones!"

Ye Tian was quite excited.

A total of 62,904 source stones and 62 medium-grade source stones were harvested from this source stone vein.

Medium-grade source stones are higher-grade source stones, which are relatively rare in the chaos, and most of the source stones are low-grade, resulting in a high value of medium-grade source stones.

In the chaos, a medium-grade source stone is equivalent to 100 lower-grade source stones, but in fact, no one trades like this, and if you really trade, you can even trade up to 200 lower-grade source stones.

"More than 60,000 source stones are equivalent to more than 600,000 points, plus the other resources harvested in this continent this time, a total of nearly 700,000 points can be obtained!"

Ye Tian calculated.

What is the concept of 700,000 points, how many chaotic supernatural powers are enough in exchange!

Ordinary Chaos Divine Powers are only two or three thousand points, and top-notch Chaos Divine Powers are only one or two thousand points at most.

In other words, Ye Tian was enough to exchange for more than a hundred Chaos Divine Powers.

Of course, Ye Tian also needed to exchange for some high-grade innate origin things, and he also needed some points.

Anyway, Ye Tian is currently not short of points.

A few years later, Ye Tian basically collected the high-level resources on this continent and left this continent.

Subsequently, Ye Tian informed the Void Heaven Temple of the coordinates of this continent, and let the Void Heaven Temple and the Terran jointly develop it.

After all, there are still a lot of resources on this continent, but Ye Tian is too lazy to collect them slowly.

Back in the Void Heaven Palace, Ye Tian began to frantically exchange points with others.

"What, the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi has obtained the source stone vein?"

Many disciples were shocked when they heard the news.

Everyone needs the source stone, if the source stone is traded to the Void Heaven system, it will be greatly discounted, so Ye Tian directly traded with the Heavenly Monarchs of the Void Heaven Temple, trading one point for one source stone.

Source stones are scarce items, and points are not necessarily scarce.

Therefore, many people are willing to trade with Ye Tian.

In a short period of time, Ye Tian traded 600,000 points.

Subsequently, Ye Tian began to exchange the Chaos Divine Power and the corresponding high-level innate origin things from the Void Heaven System.

"76 Chaos Powers!"

Ye Tian had almost finished exchanging the Chaos Divine Powers on the system, and some of the avenues even overlapped, but he still hadn't collected 100 Chaos Divine Powers.

Naturally, there are more than so many divine powers in the Void Heaven One Vein, but the system of the Void Heaven Temple is only a subsystem, and the resources and chaos supernatural power inheritance contained in it are not much, so Ye Tian can only exchange so many chaotic supernatural powers.

These Chaos Divine Powers are basically very ordinary, but there are two Chaos Divine Powers that are very precious and powerful.

One is the Blood River Immortal Technique, once this chaotic magic power is cast, a blood river can be created, covering a territory, and if the blood river is not destroyed, it will not die.

And the Blood River is not easy to annihilate, because the roots of the Blood River are rooted in the depths of the Great Dao and can be destroyed by ordinary means.

Therefore, even if a person who has practiced the Blood River Immortal Technique encounters a strong person who is one level stronger, he will not die.

If the Blood River Immortal Technique is cultivated to the extreme level, it is the ultimate chaos supernatural power, even if it is cultivated by a true monarch at the peak of the True Spirit Realm, ordinary True Ancestors will not be able to kill such a strong person.

As a result, the Blood River Immortal Technique ranked 32nd in the Chaos Divine Power, and although it ranked lower than the Space-Time Shifting Technique, its true practicality was not weaker than the Space-Time Shifting Technique.

Another chaotic supernatural power is the Golden Wing Soul Slashing Technique, which is a chaotic supernatural power involving the soul, which not only cuts the body, but also the soul.

It is rumored that once you cultivate this Chaos Divine Power to a certain level, you can easily skip the level and fight.

Ye Tian made up his mind, for a period of time in the future, he would major in the Golden Wing Soul Slashing Technique and the Blood River Immortal Technique, and as for other chaotic supernatural powers, he didn't care about getting started.

After all, a person's energy is limited, and it is impossible for Ye Tian to cultivate all the dozens or hundreds of Chaos Divine Powers to a high and profound realm.

There are 76 chaotic supernatural powers, and the avenues are somewhat overlapping, so it is impossible for Ye Tian to engrave 152 dao patterns.

After Ye Tian's calculations, he could only get 81 Dao Patterns, which was already very good.

The next few days will be relatively simple, Ye Tian is cultivating and cultivating again.

Year after year, the list on the list of god generals changes rapidly, and some people are unwilling to go down at the level of god generals, and choose to break through to the realm of the mandate of heaven and become a heavenly monarch powerhouse.

And some came from behind, replacing the gods in front.

In the era of the Great Universe, all kinds of Tianjiao rose one after another, and even the human race gave birth to some peerless Tianjiao, although they could not be compared with Ye Tian, but they were comparable to some of the official disciples of the True Ancestor.

But no matter how many Tianjiao rises, Ye Tian always occupies the first place on the list of god generals.

The combat power of the nine-star late-stage god general is enough to make any god general desperate.

More than 200,000 years have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian had already engraved more than a dozen Dao patterns on the Void Heaven Dao Body, and the number of Dao patterns on his body had reached 59.

But at this time, he still hadn't raised the Void Heaven Dao Body to the Dacheng realm.

"I have a feeling that once the 60th Dao pattern is inscribed, my Void Heaven Dao Body should be completed. Moreover, I have practiced a lot of Chaos Divine Powers, and the prototype of the Great Dao is already extremely powerful, and my strength has improved a lot compared to before, and I am currently infinitely close to the combat power of the nine-star peak divine general. If the Void Heaven Dao Body is completed, I am afraid that my strength will leap into the ranks of the nine-star peak god generals!"

Ye Tian estimated.

More than 10,000 years have passed, and on this day, Ye Tian finally engraved the 60th pattern.

Rumble!!!

The Void Heaven Dao Body transformed, Ye Tian seemed to have turned into a majestic giant, and the stripes of Dao patterns manifested in the skin, flesh, marrow, and internal organs, and the whole person was full of endless Dao rhyme.

Spallation!

Spallation!

All over the body, every part is far more powerful than before.

After a long time, Ye Tian completed his transformation.

At the same time, Ye Tian's strength has also completed its transformation, and he is no longer a nine-star late-stage god general, but has reached the rank of a nine-star peak god general.

On the ancestral monument.

Ye Tian is still the first on the list of god generals, but his strength has become a nine-star peak god general.

At this moment, countless forces knew about the changes on the list of gods.

Everyone was stunned!

What is the concept of the nine-star peak god general, in the eyes of everyone, it is the highest level of the god general level, and it is the ultimate goal pursued by countless Tianjiao of Chaos for countless years, and even the ultimate goal of the Dao Ancestor.

No one dared to say that they would definitely be able to reach the peak of the Nine Stars Divine General, and the Yunzi Divine Maiden did not dare to boast about this Haikou.

But Ye Tian reached it, and it was reached at an extremely fast speed.
